title: Bridge Essay: Inner Speech Decoding: A Comprehensive Review.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Language/Mantra** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Language as mantra — mantra meditation, inner speech, focused attention, verbal repetition.

**Inner Speech Decoding: A Comprehensive Review.** — Wiley Interdiscip Rev Cogn Sci. PMID: 41177674. DOI: 10.1002/wcs.70016. Inner speech decoding is the process of identifying silently generated speech from neural signals. In recent years, this candidate technology has gained momentum as apossible way to support communication in severely impaired populations. Specifically, this approach promises hope for people with avariety of physical or neurological disabilities who need alternative means of verbal expression.
